title: Chicco KidFit Car Seat (Use for Car with isofix or car non isofix) (3 Years old to 45.3kg)(SG READY STOCK)
detail_text: It is designed for children who are between 97 – 145cm tall, between 13.6 – 45.3kg in high-back mode and 18 – 50kg in backless mode, and can sit relatively still in the same seated position throughout the car ride. It’s homologated according to the American Standard. SIDE-IMPACT PROTECTION DuoZone head and shoulder protection is built for the way kids grow with 10 height adjustments. SUPERCINCH LATCH TIGHTENER Premium LATCH connectors with force-multiplying, one-pull tightener. ERGOBOOST COMFORT Double-foam padding and contoured seat provide comfort and support. 2-POSITION BACKREST Backrest reclines easily to comfortably mimic vehicle seat position. CONVERTS TO BACKLESS Backrest is also removable to create a backless booster for older kids. 2 CUPFOLDERS Removable, dishwasher-safe cup holders fold out of the way to save space. Head and Shoulders Above the Rest! The IIHS Best Bet KidFit® Booster is designed with 10 positions of DuoZone® side-impact protection for the way kids grow. With height adjustment from the waist—instead of at the neck—KidFit® offers both head and shoulder protection throughout every stage. Built for Protection, Stability, and Comfort KidFit® is equipped with premium LATCH connectors and a SuperCinch® one-pull tightener to stabilize the seat for easy in/out and keep it secured when unoccupied. Belt guides make it easy to position the vehicle seat belt and integrated side wings are lined with EPS energy-absorbing foam for improved impact protection. A contoured ErgoBoost® seat with double foam padding provides comfort and support in all the right places, and a 2-position backrest adjusts to mimic the vehicle seat position. The backrest is also removable to create a backless booster for older children. Convenient and Roadtrip-Ready Two dishwasher-safe cup holders fold out of the way when empty and are easy to remove for cleaning. All fabrics, including armrest covers, are removable and machine-washable. detail_html:
It is designed for children who are between 97 – 145cm tall, between 13.6 – 45.3kg in high-back mode and 18 – 50kg in backless mode, and can sit relatively still in the same seated position throughout the car ride. It’s homologated according to the American Standard.

SIDE-IMPACT PROTECTION

DuoZone head and shoulder protection is built for the way kids grow with 10 height adjustments.

SUPERCINCH LATCH TIGHTENER

Premium LATCH connectors with force-multiplying, one-pull tightener.

ERGOBOOST COMFORT

Double-foam padding and contoured seat provide comfort and support.

2-POSITION BACKREST

Backrest reclines easily to comfortably mimic vehicle seat position.

CONVERTS TO BACKLESS

Backrest is also removable to create a backless booster for older kids.

2 CUPFOLDERS

Removable, dishwasher-safe cup holders fold out of the way to save space.

Head and Shoulders Above the Rest!

The IIHS Best Bet KidFit® Booster is designed with 10 positions of DuoZone® side-impact protection for the way kids grow. With height adjustment from the waist—instead of at the neck—KidFit® offers both head and shoulder protection throughout every stage.

Built for Protection, Stability, and Comfort

KidFit® is equipped with premium LATCH connectors and a SuperCinch® one-pull tightener to stabilize the seat for easy in/out and keep it secured when unoccupied. Belt guides make it easy to position the vehicle seat belt and integrated side wings are lined with EPS energy-absorbing foam for improved impact protection.

A contoured ErgoBoost® seat with double foam padding provides comfort and support in all the right places, and a 2-position backrest adjusts to mimic the vehicle seat position. The backrest is also removable to create a backless booster for older children.

Convenient and Roadtrip-Ready

Two dishwasher-safe cup holders fold out of the way when empty and are easy to remove for cleaning. All fabrics, including armrest covers, are removable and machine-washable.

DuoZone® head and shoulder side-impact protection with 10 positions

Premium LATCH connectors with SuperCinch® one-pull tightener

ErgoBoost® contoured seat with double foam padding

title: NEW Joie Basil 2in1 Booster Car Seat for Toddler (3-12 years)
detail_text: SAFETY Lifts your big kid and positions the vehicle seat belt to fit properly against their hips and shoulders Adjustable lower anchor attachments ensure the seat is secure when it's in the vehicle Belt guides take all the guesswork out of buckling your child, so you know exactly where the belt needs to go Cushioned headrest to keep your child comfortable COMFORT Padded armrests provide extra comfort for road trips or quick errands Breathable fabrics keep your kiddo cool on even the warmest of days One-hand, 7-position headrest gives your child a more comfortable fit as they grow CONVENIENCE Easily transitions from highback to backless booster to keep your child safe no matter how big they think they are The removable cover easily comes off the seat, so you can shake out any crumbs and let the washing machine take care of the rest 2 easy-clean cup holders keep road trip essentials (cup, snack, toys) close within your child’s reach Weighing in at just 9 lb., this light booster makes transferring to other cars easy SPECIFICATIONS Highback booster size: L 46.7 × W 47.2 × H 69.9–85.1 cm Backless booster size: L 39.1 × W 44.5 cm Weight: approx. 4.1 kg Usage: 18.1–54.4 kg (Highback: 18.1–49.9 kg | Backless: 22.7–54.4 kg).
detail_html:
SAFETY

  • Lifts your big kid and positions the vehicle seat belt to fit properly against their hips and shoulders
  • Adjustable lower anchor attachments ensure the seat is secure when it's in the vehicle
  • Belt guides take all the guesswork out of buckling your child, so you know exactly where the belt needs to go
  • Cushioned headrest to keep your child comfortable

 

COMFORT

  • Padded armrests provide extra comfort for road trips or quick errands
  • Breathable fabrics keep your kiddo cool on even the warmest of days
  • One-hand, 7-position headrest gives your child a more comfortable fit as they grow

 

CONVENIENCE

  • Easily transitions from highback to backless booster to keep your child safe no matter how big they think they are
  • The removable cover easily comes off the seat, so you can shake out any crumbs and let the washing machine take care of the rest
  • 2 easy-clean cup holders keep road trip essentials (cup, snack, toys) close within your child’s reach
  • Weighing in at just 9 lb., this light booster makes transferring to other cars easy

SPECIFICATIONS

Highback booster size: L 46.7 × W 47.2 × H 69.9–85.1 cm

Backless booster size: L 39.1 × W 44.5 cm

Weight: approx. 4.1 kg

Usage: 18.1–54.4 kg (Highback: 18.1–49.9 kg | Backless: 22.7–54.4 kg).

title: Joie I-Chapp Booster Car Seat
detail_text: Keep your big kid safe and boosted with the i-Size compatible backless booster seat from Joie. i-Chapp gives your back seat passanger an extra lift to keep the lap and shoulder belt perfectly positioned across their growing bodies, and is equipped with deluxe convenient features like two cup holders, memory foam, and featherlight weight for easy transfers. Suitable from 15 to 36kg. features & benefits Meets the highest ECE R129 certification including side impact testing Specially moulded seat shell increases the strength and durability of the seat Memory foam in the seat cushion Built-in padded armrests Plush materials for cosy riding in sophisticated style Lightweight at only 2kg for the easiest transfers Green belt guides help to ensure proper seat belt positioning Machine-washable covers Two retractable cup holders for your back seat snacker Forward-facing from 135-150cm (approx. 7-12 years) and adds an extra boost for proper vehicle belt positioning i-Size compatible for a guaranteed fit in i-Size approved vehicles Fast and secure installation without ISOFIX connectors, for easier carpooling and storage whats in the box 1x booster
detail_html:
Keep your big kid safe and boosted with the i-Size compatible backless booster seat from Joie. i-Chapp gives your back seat passanger an extra lift to keep the lap and shoulder belt perfectly positioned across their growing bodies, and is equipped with deluxe convenient features like two cup holders, memory foam, and featherlight weight for easy transfers. Suitable from 15 to 36kg.

features & benefits
  • Meets the highest ECE R129 certification including side impact testing
  • Specially moulded seat shell increases the strength and durability of the seat
  • Memory foam in the seat cushion
  • Built-in padded armrests
  • Plush materials for cosy riding in sophisticated style
  • Lightweight at only 2kg for the easiest transfers
  • Green belt guides help to ensure proper seat belt positioning
  • Machine-washable covers
  • Two retractable cup holders for your back seat snacker
  • Forward-facing from 135-150cm (approx. 7-12 years) and adds an extra boost for proper vehicle belt positioning
  • i-Size compatible for a guaranteed fit in i-Size approved vehicles
  • Fast and secure installation without ISOFIX connectors, for easier carpooling and storage

whats in the box
  • 1x booster

brand.suggestion: More Baby Gear & Travel Essentials from Joie

product.desc:
Keep your big kid safe and boosted with the i-Size compatible backless booster seat from Joie. i-Chapp gives your back seat passanger an extra lift to keep the lap and shoulder belt perfectly positioned across their growing bodies, and is equipped with deluxe convenient features like two cup holders, memory foam, and featherlight weight for easy transfers. Suitable from 15 to 36kg.

features & benefits
  • Meets the highest ECE R129 certification including side impact testing
  • Specially moulded seat shell increases the strength and durability of the seat
  • Memory foam in the seat cushion
  • Built-in padded armrests
  • Plush materials for cosy riding in sophisticated style
  • Lightweight at only 2kg for the easiest transfers
  • Green belt guides help to ensure proper seat belt positioning
  • Machine-washable covers
  • Two retractable cup holders for your back seat snacker
  • Forward-facing from 135-150cm (approx. 7-12 years) and adds an extra boost for proper vehicle belt positioning
  • i-Size compatible for a guaranteed fit in i-Size approved vehicles
  • Fast and secure installation without ISOFIX connectors, for easier carpooling and storage

whats in the box
  • 1x booster

product.desc:
Product Weight: 4.8kgs 

 

Testing Certification: ECE R44/04 

 

Product Size: l 50 x w 50.8 x h 63-83 cm
product.highlights:
SAFETY  

We’ve thought of everything to keep your little one safe and secure, so all you have to do is decide where you want to go:  

 

  • Side impact protection provides added security for the head, body and hips so you can travel worry-free 
  • Well-marked, colour-coded installation paths take the guesswork out of installation 
  • Get peace of mind that your seatbelt installation is snug and secure with a built-in lock-off device

COMFORT   Whether you’re on a road trip, or simply hauling kiddos from school to practice and back home again, you want a seat that will keep your kiddo comfy: 

  

  • Keep your kiddo cool on even the hottest of days with ventilated mesh sides to help regulate their temperature 
  • Integrated cupholder holds little one’s essentials in a handy spot so you can avoid hangry meltdowns 

 

CONVENIENCE  

With the elevate™ belted booster seat, you’ll get convenience features meant to keep on-the-go mums and dads moving: 

 

  • A 10 position headrest that will easily adjust to the perfect height with just one hand 
  • Accommodate those unexpected growth spurts with our Grow Together™ headrest and harness system that adjusts simultaneously… even while the seat is installed 
  • Easily clean up messes with removable, machine washable covers  
  • Easy installation with the 3-point vehicle belt 

Product Features:

  • Group 1/2/3 car seat
  • Suitable forward facing from 9kg to 36kg/12years
  • Slide impact protection provides added security for(head,body and hips)
  • One-hand, 9 position height adjustable headrest
  • Grow Together headrest and harness system adjust simultaneously and require no re-threading of harness
  • Removable ,machne washable overs
  • Intergrated cupholder
  • Ventilated mesh sides
  • Well marked, colour-coded installation paths
  • Easy installation with lock-off device
  •

title: [Jarrons & Co] EvenFlo Sutton Car Seat (1 Year Warranty)
detail_text: Specifications BrandEvenfloSKU278711644_SGAMZ-8944219878Outer MaterialPolyesterIsofixNoModelEvenFlo Sutton Carseat (9-36kg)Recommended UserBelow 4-year old Highlights Sutton features multiple modes of use. The adjustable seat offers a simple car seat solution for a growing child. The seat ranges from group 1/2/3 (9-36kg). The seat truly grows with the child. Starting out with a harness system, the seat converts to a high-back booster with headrest adjust that uses the cars belt system. From there, the third mode changes to a booster seat base for added height. Along with the modes, the seat features a cup holder adaptable to both sides of the seat. Once little one is ready to face forward in a child seat, Sutton is the best booster seat option. Group 1/2/3 Three modes of use from high back booster to booster seat Soft fabrics for added comfort, Washable softgoods 5-point harness, 6-position headrest Side impact protection Multi-position cup holder Product Size: 47x42x67cm, Product Weight: 4.2kg Recommended Use: Child's Weight: 9-36kg, Age: 9 months - 12 Years 1 Year Local Warranty Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

detail_html:
Highlight description:

Easy to Carry: This travelling booster seat is compact and lightweight, easily fits in your suitcase or car boot, comes with a handy carry bag to keep it clean and ready for any outing

Safe and Comfortable: Breathable and comfortable, the soft design allows for softer support for the legs and hips, providing comfortable cushioning and preventing internal damage in the event of an accident

Fast Inflate and Deflate : Inflates and deflates in seconds, no pump required. Easy setup means more time enjoying and less time setting up this inflatable booster seat

Easy to Clean: Removable and machine washable inflatable seat booster cushion, because of its smooth texture, it can usually be removed by gently wiping with a damp cloth, which is very convenient for outdoor use, even if it gets dirty, it can be quickly restored to a clean and tidy state

Wide Range of Uses: Suitable for use at home, restaurants, theatres, etc. This portable booster seat provides a cleaner and safer alternative to public seating

Detailed description:

Product Texture: PVC+Net
Color: Black, Red, Blue
Product Size: 49 × 37 × 2cm

Parts List:

1 × Cushion
1 × Liner

title: Bonbijou Explorer Foldable Car Seat (INCLUDE CAR SEAT BAG & CUP HOLDER)(ISOFIX)
detail_text: At A Glance If you're looking for a car seat that's easy to use, safe and most importantly not take up alot of space when not in use, look no further than the Bonbijou Explorer Foldable Car Seat. This seat is designed to fit children from 9kg to 36kg, and can be installed with ISOFIX or your car's seat belt. The best part is that it folds up in seconds, so you can take it with you wherever you go. The Bonbijou Explorer Foldable Car Seat has a 5 point harness that keeps your child secure, and a headrest that adjusts to their height. The seat pad, body insert and harness covers are soft and cozy, and can be washed in the machine. Plus, this seat meets the ECE Regulation 44/04 standards for safety, so you can rest assured that your child is well protected. Features and Benefits: Easy to install using ISOFIX Suitable for Group 1/2/3 (9kg to 36kg) Lightweight, portable seat is ideal for busy, active parents Easily assembled and folded for keeping when not in use 5 point seat belt Multi-position adjustable headrest easily adapts to your growing child Car belt guides help you correctly position your vehicle's seat belt Comfortable seat pad, body insert and harness covers are machine washable Body insert pad is reversible, with one sided mesh that helps to keep you child cool while seated Rigorously crash tested to comply with ECE Regulation 44/04 Product Dimensions: Dimensions (Opened): H56 x W45 x D42 cm Dimensions (Closed): H29 x W42 x D42 cm Weight: 7kg
detail_html:
At A Glance If you're looking for a car seat that's easy to use, safe and most importantly not take up alot of space when not in use, look no further than the Bonbijou Explorer Foldable Car Seat. This seat is designed to fit children from 9kg to 36kg, and can be installed with ISOFIX or your car's seat belt. The best part is that it folds up in seconds, so you can take it with you wherever you go. The Bonbijou Explorer Foldable Car Seat has a 5 point harness that keeps your child secure, and a headrest that adjusts to their height. The seat pad, body insert and harness covers are soft and cozy, and can be washed in the machine. Plus, this seat meets the ECE Regulation 44/04 standards for safety, so you can rest assured that your child is well protected. 

Features and Benefits:

  • Easy to install using ISOFIX
  • Suitable for Group 1/2/3 (9kg to 36kg)
  • Lightweight, portable seat is ideal for busy, active parents
  • Easily assembled and folded for keeping when not in use 
  • 5 point seat belt
  • Multi-position adjustable headrest easily adapts to your growing child
  • Car belt guides help you correctly position your vehicle's seat belt
  • Comfortable seat pad, body insert and harness covers are machine washable
  • Body insert pad is reversible, with one sided mesh that helps to keep you child cool while seated
  • Rigorously crash tested to comply with ECE Regulation 44/04

Product Dimensions: Dimensions (Opened): H56 x W45 x D42 cm Dimensions (Closed): H29 x W42 x D42 cm Weight: 7kg

title: Baby Portable Safety Car Seat (Car Seat)
detail_text: ✔️SG Local Seller ✔️Fast Delivery 1-3 days ✔️ Ready Stock & Ship from Singapore PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: - Suitable for age: 2-12 yrs old (Large) - Material: Polyester - Filling: Polyester Fiber Installation Method 1： 1) Open the back of the car seat to be installed forward, and pass the two webbings at the bottom of the safety seat through the lower gap of the car seat 2) The two webbings on the top of the safety seat are wound from the back of the car seat the back of the car seat; and the safety buckle is fastened. Installation Method 2 (Backrest does not fall down)： 1) Fixed headrest buckle 2) Pass the chuck in the gap 3) Instructions is finished.
detail_html:
✔️SG Local Seller


✔️Fast Delivery 1-3 days


✔️ Ready Stock & Ship from Singapore




PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS:


- Suitable for age: 2-12 yrs old (Large) 

- Material: Polyester 

- Filling: Polyester  Fiber


Installation 

Method 1：

1) Open the back of the car seat to be installed forward, and pass the two webbings at the bottom of the safety seat through the lower gap of the car seat 

2) The two webbings on the top of the safety seat are wound from the back of the car seat the back of the car seat; and the safety buckle is fastened.


Installation Method 2 (Backrest does not fall down)：

1) Fixed headrest buckle 

2) Pass the chuck in the gap

3) Instructions is finished.

product.desc:
✔️SG Local Seller


✔️Fast Delivery 1-3 days


✔️ Ready Stock & Ship from Singapore




PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS:


- Suitable for age: 2-12 yrs old (Large) 

- Material: Polyester 

- Filling: Polyester  Fiber


Installation 

Method 1：

1) Open the back of the car seat to be installed forward, and pass the two webbings at the bottom of the safety seat through the lower gap of the car seat 

2) The two webbings on the top of the safety seat are wound from the back of the car seat the back of the car seat; and the safety buckle is fastened.


Installation Method 2 (Backrest does not fall down)：

1) Fixed headrest buckle 

2) Pass the chuck in the gap

3) Instructions is finished.

title: [Jarrons & Co] Evenflo Theron 3-in-1 Booster Car Seat
detail_text: Evenflo Theron 3-in-1 Booster Car Seat features multiple modes of use. The adjustable seat offers a simple car seat solution for a growing child. The seat ranges from group 1/2/3 (9-36kg). The seat truly grows with the child. Starting out with a harness system, the seat converts to a high-back booster with headrest adjust that uses the cars belt system. From there, the third mode changes to a booster seat base for added height. Along with the modes, the seat features a cup holder adaptable to both sides of the seat. Once little one is ready to face forward in a child seat, Theron is the best booster seat option. Evenflo Theron Booster Car Seat is perfect for the young ones who are always ready for adventures. The back is removable to turn it into a booster. It has been designed and tested to withstands impact to always protect your little ones.

title: Combi Safetrip Foldable Travel Car Seat G123 (Promo)
detail_text: The Combi SafeTrip G123 is a lightweight and foldable ISOFIX car seat designed to grow with your child from toddler to junior stage. Built according to the latest UN R129 i-Size safety standard, it provides enhanced protection, comfort, and easy installation for everyday family travel. ✨ Key Features • Complies with latest UN R129 i-Size safety standard • Suitable for children from 76cm – 150cm • Approx. 15 months up to 12 years old • ISOFIX one-step installation system for secure fitting • Top tether alert system for added safety protection • 15-level adjustable headrest to grow with your child • 4 recline positions for comfortable seating • Foldable compact design for easy storage and portability • Lightweight design at only approximately 5.7kg • Breathable and comfortable seat cushioning • Side impact protection for enhanced safety during travel Product Specifications • Applicable Height: 76cm – 150cm • Toddler Mode: 76cm – 105cm • Junior Mode: 100cm – 150cm • Recommended Age: 15 months – 12 years old • Product Weight: Approx. 5.7kg • Installation Method: ISOFIX + Top Tether • Available Colors: Black / Light Grey Why Parents Love It The SafeTrip G123 is designed for families who want a practical long-term car seat with easy installation and compact storage. Its lightweight foldable design makes it ideal for switching between vehicles, travelling, and saving space when not in use. Safety & Convenience Combined With adjustable head support, multiple recline positions, and i-Size certified protection, the SafeTrip G123 delivers both comfort and peace of mind for every journey.
detail_html:
The Combi SafeTrip G123 is a lightweight and foldable ISOFIX car seat designed to grow with your child from toddler to junior stage. Built according to the latest UN R129 i-Size safety standard, it provides enhanced protection, comfort, and easy installation for everyday family travel.

✨ Key Features

• Complies with latest UN R129 i-Size safety standard

• Suitable for children from 76cm – 150cm

• Approx. 15 months up to 12 years old

• ISOFIX one-step installation system for secure fitting

• Top tether alert system for added safety protection

• 15-level adjustable headrest to grow with your child

• 4 recline positions for comfortable seating

• Foldable compact design for easy storage and portability

• Lightweight design at only approximately 5.7kg

• Breathable and comfortable seat cushioning

• Side impact protection for enhanced safety during travel

Product Specifications

• Applicable Height: 76cm – 150cm

• Toddler Mode: 76cm – 105cm

• Junior Mode: 100cm – 150cm

• Recommended Age: 15 months – 12 years old

• Product Weight: Approx. 5.7kg

• Installation Method: ISOFIX + Top Tether

• Available Colors: Black / Light Grey

Why Parents Love It

The SafeTrip G123 is designed for families who want a practical long-term car seat with easy installation and compact storage. Its lightweight foldable design makes it ideal for switching between vehicles, travelling, and saving space when not in use.

Safety & Convenience Combined

With adjustable head support, multiple recline positions, and i-Size certified protection, the SafeTrip G123 delivers both comfort and peace of mind for every journey.

Its lightweight foldable design makes it ideal for switching between vehicles, travelling, and saving space when not in use.  Safety & Convenience CombinedWith adjustable head support, multiple recline positions, and i-Size certified protection, the SafeTrip G123 delivers both comfort and peace of mind for every journey.

title: Mimosa Magnus v2 Foldable I-Size Car Seat (SG Ready stock)
detail_text: Introducing the Mimosa Magnus v2, the perfect car seat for families who value flexibility, safety, and convenience. Designed to provide secure and comfortable travel for your child from 15 months to 12 years, the Mimosa Magnus v2 offers innovative features like a secure ISOFIX installation, side impact protection, and 15 adjustable height levels to grow with your child. With its foldable design and included carry bag, it’s also an ideal solution for families on the move, ensuring your child’s safety and comfort no matter where your journey takes you.

title: Kinderkraft Car Seat, I Boost 2 Pro - 2 Colors
detail_text: Secure ISOFIX installation AIR FLOW system for better air circulation Comfortable, wide seat with soft foam Main advantages For children 125–150 cm tall – approx. 6 to 12 years old Crash-tested for proven safety Complies with the latest European safety standard R129 i-Size Stable ISOFIX installation – quick, secure, and compatible with most cars Comfortable, wide seat filled with soft foam for lasting comfort, even on long journeys Ergonomic armrests designed to naturally support the child’s arms Practical belt guides make it easier to fasten the seat belt correctly AIR FLOW system – breathable 3D mesh fabric improves air circulation and keeps your child comfortable Compact and exceptionally lightweight design – only 2.36 kg, easy to carry and install Removable, machine-washable cover made of high-quality, durable materials
detail_html:
• Secure ISOFIX installation
  • AIR FLOW system for better air circulation
  • Comfortable, wide seat with soft foam

Main advantages

For children 125–150 cm tall – approx. 6 to 12 years old

Crash-tested for proven safety Complies with the latest European safety standard R129 i-Size Stable ISOFIX installation – quick, secure, and compatible with most cars Comfortable, wide seat filled with soft foam for lasting comfort, even on long journeys Ergonomic armrests designed to naturally support the child’s arms Practical belt guides make it easier to fasten the seat belt correctly AIR FLOW system – breathable 3D mesh fabric improves air circulation and keeps your child comfortable Compact and exceptionally lightweight design – only 2.36 kg, easy to carry and install Removable, machine-washable cover made of high-quality, durable materials

detail_blocks.text: Secure ISOFIX installation AIR FLOW system for better air circulation Comfortable, wide seat with soft foam Main advantages For children 125–150 cm tall – approx. 6 to 12 years old Crash-tested for proven safety Complies with the latest European safety standard R129 i-Size Stable ISOFIX installation – quick, secure, and compatible with most cars Comfortable, wide seat filled with soft foam for lasting comfort, even on long journeys Ergonomic armrests designed to naturally support the child’s arms Practical belt guides make it easier to fasten the seat belt correctly AIR FLOW system – breathable 3D mesh fabric improves air circulation and keeps your child comfortable Compact and exceptionally lightweight design – only 2.36 kg, easy to carry and install Removable, machine-washable cover made of high-quality, durable materials

title: Evenflo Theron 3-in-1 Booster Car Seat
detail_text: Description Theron features multiple modes of use. The adjustable seat offers a simple car seat solution for a growing child. The seat ranges from group 1/2/3 (9-36kg). The seat truly grows with the child. Starting out with a harness system, the seat converts to a high-back booster with headrest adjust that uses the cars belt system. From there, the third mode changes to a booster seat base for added height. Along with the modes, the seat features a cup holder adaptable to both sides of the seat. Once little one is ready to face forward in a child seat, Theron is the best booster seat option. Evenflo Theron Booster Car Seat is perfect for the young ones who are always ready for adventures. The back is removable to turn it into a booster. It has been designed and tested to withstands impact to always protect your little ones. Product Features Group 1,2,3 Suitable for 9-36kg Forward facing Air protect system for added side impact protection Adjustable headrest Good ventilation Optional cup holder Converts to a booster seat Washable seat cover Product Dimensions: 49.53 x 52.7 x 70.54 cm Package Dimensions: 51 x 43 x 40 cm Weight: 7.2 Kg Recommended Age: Suitable for 2 years to 12 years
detail_html:
Description

Theron features multiple modes of use. The adjustable seat offers a simple car seat solution for a growing child. The seat ranges from group 1/2/3 (9-36kg). The seat truly grows with the child. Starting out with a harness system, the seat converts to a high-back booster with headrest adjust that uses the cars belt system. From there, the third mode changes to a booster seat base for added height. Along with the modes, the seat features a cup holder adaptable to both sides of the seat. Once little one is ready to face forward in a child seat, Theron is the best booster seat option. Evenflo Theron Booster Car Seat is perfect for the young ones who are always ready for adventures. The back is removable to turn it into a booster. It has been designed and tested to withstands impact to always protect your little ones.

Product Features

  • Group 1,2,3
  • Suitable for 9-36kg
  • Forward facing
  • Air protect system for added side impact protection
  • Adjustable headrest
  • Good ventilation
  • Optional cup holder
  • Converts to a booster seat
  • Washable seat cover

Product Dimensions: 49.53 x 52.7 x 70.54 cm

Package Dimensions: 51 x 43 x 40 cm

Weight: 7.2 Kg

Recommended Age:

Suitable for 2 years to 12 years

title: Mimosa Magnus v2 Foldable I-Size Car Seat
detail_text: Introducing the Mimosa Magnus v2, the perfect car seat for families who value flexibility, safety, and convenience. Designed to provide secure and comfortable travel for your child from 15 months to 12 years, the Mimosa Magnus v2 offers innovative features like a secure ISOFIX installation, side impact protection, and 15 adjustable height levels to grow with your child. With its foldable design and included carry bag, it’s also an ideal solution for families on the move, ensuring your child’s safety and comfort no matter where your journey takes you. Features & Benefits Secure ISOFIX installation Side impact protection Foldable 15 height levels Comes with carry bag From 15 months to 12 years Material: Polyester Dimensions: 45cm(W) x 49cm(D) x 58cm(H) Folded Dimensions: 45cm(W) x 25.5cm(D) x 54cm(H) Weight: 6.45kg Care Instructions Please refer to user manual in product box What's in the box 1x carseat + carry bag

Easy Portability The innokids car safety seat is designed for easy portability, making it ideal for travel and on-the-go use. Foldable Design Its foldable design allows for easy storage and transportation, ensuring convenience for parents on the move. Durable Material Constructed with durable materials, this safety seat provides reliable protection for your child during car rides.

detail_text: Introducing the Mums Choice Isofix Booster Seat , a reliable and comfortable solution designed to prioritize safety and convenience for your growing child. Compliant with the ECE R129 (i-Size) Certified standard , this booster seat ensures secure and proper restraint during car journeys. The Isofix installation system simplifies the securing process onto the vehicle seat, offering both stability and ease of use. For added practicality, the seat features a retractable Isofix bar, allowing for compact storage when not in use. T he large and comfortable seat provides ample space for your child, enhancing their travel experience. As a thoughtful addition, our Booster Seat includes a cup holder, catering to the convenience of both parents and children alike. Choose safety, comfort, and functionality with the Mums Choice Isofix Booster Seat—a reliable travel companion for your child's journey. title: Prego Baby Class 777 Newborn Toddler Children Car Seat Carseat Baby Car Sit Kerusi Baby Kereta JPJ Approved
detail_text: Specifications BrandPregoSKU2027195964_SGAMZ-11057322518Weight15-20 kgBaby MaterialCotton-Polyester BlendIsofixNoRecommended UserUnisex,0-4years Highlights Embracing parenthood with prego® baby. Established in Malaysia, our mission is to become parents best helpers in taking care of their little ones. Read more about us: www.pregobaby.com.my Introducing Class series model 777 child safety carseat. This model has the thickest cushion or support which provides your child the most comfy ride. Dark colour combination of geomatic motif, our fabric is selectively chosen to provide smooth touch. ECE Certified R44.04 Suitable for newborn to 4 years old or a child whose weight is 0 to 18kg. Group 0+ and 1 The net weight of the carseat is 4.8kg Injection moulding. Cover is removable and washable (hand wash and let to dry) 4 sitting positions for Rear Facing 0-13kg (Group 0+) 4 sitting positions for Forward Facing 9-18kg (Group 1) 5 point harness safety system Removable newborn insert or cushion to fit your growing child How to install? Check out this simple easy to follow video here https://youtu.be/O4W_y2xEsX0 Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

product.highlights:
• Embracing parenthood with prego® baby. Established in Malaysia, our mission is to become parents best helpers in taking care of their little ones. Read more about us: www.pregobaby.com.my
  • Introducing Class series model 777 child safety carseat. This model has the thickest cushion or support which provides your child the most comfy ride. Dark colour combination of geomatic motif, our fabric is selectively chosen to provide smooth touch. ECE Certified R44.04
  • Suitable for newborn to 4 years old or a child whose weight is 0 to 18kg. Group 0+ and 1
  • The net weight of the carseat is 4.8kg
  • Injection moulding. Cover is removable and washable (hand wash and let to dry)
  • 4 sitting positions for Rear Facing 0-13kg (Group 0+)
  • 4 sitting positions for Forward Facing 9-18kg (Group 1)
  • 5 point harness safety system
  • Removable newborn insert or cushion to fit your growing child
  • How to install? Check out this simple easy to follow video here https://youtu.be/O4W_y2xEsX0

title: Kinderkraft Car Seat, I Boost 2 Pro (2 Colours)
detail_text: KINDERKRAFT Car Seat, I Boost 2 Pro (2 Colours) Crash-tested for proven safety Complies with the latest European safety standard R129 i-Size Stable ISOFIX installation – quick, secure, and compatible with most cars Comfortable, wide seat filled with soft foam for lasting comfort, even on long journeys Ergonomic armrests designed to naturally support the child’s arms Practical belt guides make it easier to fasten the seat belt correctly AIR FLOW system – breathable 3D mesh fabric improves air circulation and keeps your child comfortable Compact and exceptionally lightweight design – only 2.36 kg, easy to carry and install Removable, machine-washable cover made of high-quality, durable materials Main Advantages: ✔ Easy and secure ISOFIX installation The I-BOOST 2 PRO car seat is installed in seconds using the ISOFIX system. Simply attach the connectors to your car’s ISOFIX anchors, and visual indicators confirm correct installation. This ensures maximum stability and safety during every trip. ✔ Lightweight and convenient to carry Weighing just 2.36 kg, the I-BOOST 2 PRO is easy to move between cars. Its lightweight, compact design makes installation effortless while maintaining durability and strength. ✔ Wide, soft seat with AIR FLOW system The seat is filled with soft foam and features a 3D mesh fabric insert that improves air circulation. This ensures your child stays comfortable even on hot days and during long journeys. ✔ Ergonomic armrests The armrests are designed to naturally support the position of your child’s arms, improving comfort while traveling. They also help guide the seat belt correctly, enhancing overall safety.
detail_html:
KINDERKRAFT Car Seat, I Boost 2 Pro (2 Colours)



Crash-tested for proven safety Complies with the latest European safety standard R129 i-Size Stable ISOFIX installation – quick, secure, and compatible with most cars Comfortable, wide seat filled with soft foam for lasting comfort, even on long journeys Ergonomic armrests designed to naturally support the child’s arms Practical belt guides make it easier to fasten the seat belt correctly AIR FLOW system – breathable 3D mesh fabric improves air circulation and keeps your child comfortable Compact and exceptionally lightweight design – only 2.36 kg, easy to carry and install Removable, machine-washable cover made of high-quality, durable materials



Main Advantages:

✔ Easy and secure ISOFIX installation

The I-BOOST 2 PRO car seat is installed in seconds using the ISOFIX system. Simply attach the connectors to your car’s ISOFIX anchors, and visual indicators confirm correct installation. This ensures maximum stability and safety during every trip.

✔ Lightweight and convenient to carry

Weighing just 2.36 kg, the I-BOOST 2 PRO is easy to move between cars. Its lightweight, compact design makes installation effortless while maintaining durability and strength.

✔ Wide, soft seat with AIR FLOW system

The seat is filled with soft foam and features a 3D mesh fabric insert that improves air circulation. This ensures your child stays comfortable even on hot days and during long journeys.

✔ Ergonomic armrests

The armrests are designed to naturally support the position of your child’s arms, improving comfort while traveling. They also help guide the seat belt correctly, enhancing overall safety.
